prestazioni: APR Stage 3+ turbocharger upgrade for the **CDL 2.0L TFSI** engine, featuring a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbo with billet compressor wheel, 0.82 A/R turbine housing, and integrated wastegate, paired with APR’s CNC-machined intake manifold and upgraded fuel system (Bosch 440cc injectors, APR HPFP, and Walbro 450 LPFP) to support 450+ HP on 93 octane with a custom ECU calibration via Cobb Accessport V3

KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable damping) with TÜV-approved spring rates (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear) and spherical top mounts (034 Motorsport), combined with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear anti-roll bars for reduced body roll and optimized camber gain via custom alignment specs (-2.8° front, -2.2° rear)

034 Motorsport Motorsport-spec **CDL** engine internals: forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (8.5:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, ARP 625+ head studs, and a lightweight crankshaft pulley, paired with a custom-mapped **Bosch MED17.5 ECU** via Alientech KESS3 for knock-resistant timing and direct port methanol injection (Snow Performance Stage 3 kit with dual nozzles)
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (TTS-specific) with carbon fiber front fenders, extended rear quarter panels (30mm wider), and a functional rear diffuser with integrated tow hooks, finished in custom Audi Nardo Gray with matte black accents and clear bra (XPEL Ultimate) on high-impact zones

OEM+ Audi Sport S3 rear bumper with custom 3D-printed carbon fiber side skirts (Audi-approved CAD design) and a Seibon carbon fiber hood (with functional NACA ducts for **CDL** intercooler cooling), paired with Hella Pagid 8-piston front/4-piston rear brake calipers (380mm rotors) and OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels (19x9.5 ET35 front, 19x10.5 ET40 rear) in Gloss Anthracite

Interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber backs, Alcantara/leather upholstery), custom roll cage (Chromoly 4130, bolt-in design by AutoPower Industries), and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede) paired with a **CDL**-specific ECU display (AEM X-Series 7-inch touchscreen) and a full Alcantara headliner (EuroCompulsion)
